featureSections.title: Professional Auto Repair & Maintenance

featureSections.cardBody: Bring your car in for any service and receive a complimentary 30-point inspection.

featureSections.title: Transparent & Honest Service
featureSections.body: We believe in clear communication and fair pricing. No hidden fees, no upsells—just honest advice.
featureSections.cardBody: We respect your time. Most maintenance and repairs are completed the same day.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?
cta.subheadline: Call us or book online today. We're here to help.

servicesPage.intro: At East Side Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services for all makes and models. Our expert mechanics use the latest technology to keep your vehicle running smoothly.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert engine diagnostics and repair using advanced equipment.
services.longDescription: Our ASE-certified technicians perform thorough engine diagnostics to identify issues accurately. From check engine lights to major repairs, we restore performance and reliability.
benefits: Comprehensive repair options from minor to major

process.title: Comprehensive Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes and assess performance.

process.title: Detailed Explanation
process.description: We review findings with you, explain the issue, and provide a clear estimate.

process.title: Expert Repair
process.description: Our mechanics perform the repair using quality parts, then test drive to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics take about 30 minutes to an hour, depending on the complexity.

faqs.question: Do you work on all car makes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service all domestic and foreign vehicles.

services.title: Brake Services
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement.
services.longDescription: Your safety is our priority. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid to ensure your brakes are responsive and reliable.
benefits: High-quality pads and rotors for long life
No squeaking or vibration after service
Competitive pricing with no hidden fees

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We check pad thickness, rotor condition, and fluid levels.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We show you the condition and recommend necessary repairs.

process.title: Installation & Test
process.description: We install new parts and test the brakes for optimal performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brakes?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits.

faqs.question: Do you offer brake pad warranties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we warranty our brake pads and labor for your peace of mind.

services.title: Oil Changes & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes and maintenance.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are vital for engine longevity. We use quality oils and filters, and also perform multi-point inspections to catch issues early.

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We drain the old oil and replace the filter.

process.title: Add Fresh Oil
process.description: We add the correct grade and amount of oil for your vehicle.

process.title: Multi-Point Check
process.description: We inspect belts, hoses, lights, and tire pressure.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use conventional and synthetic blends based on your manufacturer's recommendation.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000 to 5,000 miles for conventional oil, up to 7,500 for synthetic.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with expert AC and heating service.
services.longDescription: From weak airflow to no cold air, we diagnose and repair your vehicle's HVAC system quickly. We service all makes and models.

process.title: System Diagnosis
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and electrical components.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: We locate any leaks using UV dye or electronic detectors.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We fix the issue and recharge the system to manufacturer specs.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak.

faqs.question: How long does an AC repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed within 2-3 hours.

about.headline: Your Local Auto Repair Experts in Dallas
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair with exceptional customer service.
story: East Side Auto Repair was founded with a simple mission: offer reliable auto repair without the hassle. Our team of experienced mechanics has been serving the Dallas community for over 15 years, building a reputation for honesty and quality work.

We understand that car trouble is stressful. That's why we prioritize clear communication, fair pricing, and fast turnaround. Whether it's a simple oil change or a complex engine repair, we treat every car as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only top-quality parts and tools.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat every customer with courtesy and transparency.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We are proud to serve and support our local Dallas community.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.subheadline: We're here to answer your questions and schedule your appointment.
